title: Founding Operator
must_haves: Account management or customer success background with book-of-business ownership
High agency, problem-solving; some scripting/automation familiarity a plus
Open to a range of backgrounds (no IB/consulting/elite-degree gate)
met_strengths: AI-native operator building agents with Claude Code (J&J is an AI recruiter product)
Community-led growth, lifecycle and onboarding ownership (50k node-runners, 100k community) maps to adoption/expansion
one_line_verdict: Open, no pedigree gate, AI-product, founder-facing - good generalist fit; main gap is classic CS/account-management book-of-business ownership and 5-day in-person.
fetch_note: Confirmed open via StudySmarter mirror (active Apply button). This is the J&J INTERNAL Jill-Delivery Founding Operator (CS/account mgmt/expansion), GBP100-180k flexible cash/equity. NOTE: aggregators host external Founding Operator roles (e.g. Arctal) under the J&J board - this verdict is for the J&J internal role per the supplied Ashby URL.
